cards.title: Vector Sets support
cards.body: Full support for Vector Sets, the Redis 8 vector-native data type: create them manually or from a bundled sample dataset, add elements, and run similarity search end-to-end.
cards.location: Browser — add a key of type Vector Set

cards.title: Dev vs Production database mode
cards.body: Classify databases by environment with clear visual indicators, and require type-to-confirm for destructive actions on production databases.
cards.location: Database list — edit a database's connection settings

cards.title: Geodata Workbench plugin
cards.body: Renders Redis GEO command results as an interactive map, density heatmap, or details card — auto-selected per command.
cards.location: Workbench — run a GEO command (e.g. GEOSEARCH)
